scripts.start: test -f .env || { echo 'No .env found — run: cp .env.example .env' >&2; exit 1; }; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; export CONTENT_DIR="${CONTENT_DIR:-$PWD/content}"; COMPOSE='docker compose'; docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1 || COMPOSE=docker-compose; $COMPOSE -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait postgres && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm build && pnpm --parallel --filter './apps/*' start
scripts.stop: COMPOSE='docker compose'; docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1 || COMPOSE=docker-compose; $COMPOSE -f infra/docker-compose.yml down
